form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (18.99) over 320m at this track. Expected to be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (18.99) over 320m at this track. Expected to be tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn was tightened for room and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 401m at this track on March 25. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish the race over 401m at this track on March 25. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and fell.
Was hampered by contact in the turn to the home straight.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by a nose at this track over 320m (18.19) beating Crimson Dynamo in Mix 1/2/3 on April 1. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by a nose at this track over 320m (18.19) beating Crimson Dynamo in Mix 1/2/3 on April 1. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn galloped off the heels.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 400m at Bulli in a handy (22.63), beating Mighty Trojan. Will find this a bit tougher, this will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 400m at Bulli in a handy (22.63), beating Mighty Trojan. Will find this a bit tougher, this will test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together approaching the 320m boxes and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of five months when fifth at Bulli over 340m. Awkward draw and looks safely held this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of five months when fifth at Bulli over 340m. Awkward draw and looks safely held this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 320m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (18.78) behind Canya Supersonic in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 1. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 320m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (18.78) behind Canya Supersonic in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 1. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (18.47) over 320m at this track. Wide draw here. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (18.47) over 320m at this track. Wide draw here. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of four-and-a-half months when sixth at Gosford over 388m. Good speed but boxed wide and will need a little luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of four-and-a-half months when sixth at Gosford over 388m. Good speed but boxed wide and will need a little luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the home straight came together and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.81) at big odds over 401m at this track. In the mix on her best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.81) at big odds over 401m at this track. In the mix on her best form.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th in a Mix 3/4 on March 31 over 388m at Gosford behind Tilly The Filly beaten 8 lengths (23.56). Capable of taking this out.
